title: Bridge Essay: Effective Connectivity of Functionally Anticorrelated Networks Under Lysergic Ac

body.text: This bridge paper connects the esoteric/philosophical concept of **Liberation/Enlightenment** with mechanistic science from PubMed/MEDLINE.
**Bridge rationale:** Liberation and enlightenment — ego dissolution, self-transcendence, psychedelic-induced mystical experience, spiritual awakening, enlightenment neuroscience.

**Effective Connectivity of Functionally Anticorrelated Networks Under Lysergic Acid Diethylamide.** — Biol Psychiatry. PMID: 36270812. DOI: 10.1016/j.biopsych.2022.07.013. Classic psychedelic-induced ego dissolution involves ashift in the sense of self and ablurring of the boundary between the self and the world. Asimilar phenomenon is identified in psychopathology and is associated with the balance of anticorrelated activity between the default mode network, which directs attention inward, and the salience network, which recruits the dorsal attention network to direct attention outward.
